speaker: CAESAR
text: You may see, Lepidus, and henceforth know,

speaker: CAESAR
text: It is not Caesar’s natural vice to hate

speaker: CAESAR
text: Our great competitor. From Alexandria

speaker: CAESAR
text: This is the news: he fishes, drinks, and wastes

speaker: CAESAR
text: The lamps of night in revel, is not more manlike

speaker: CAESAR
text: Than Cleopatra, nor the queen of Ptolemy

speaker: CAESAR
text: More womanly than he; hardly gave audience, or

speaker: CAESAR
text: Vouchsafed to think he had partners. You shall find there

speaker: CAESAR
text: A man who is th’ abstract of all faults

speaker: CAESAR
text: That all men follow.

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: I must not think there are

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Evils enough to darken all his goodness.

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: His faults in him seem as the spots of heaven,

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: More fiery by night’s blackness, hereditary

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Rather than purchased, what he cannot change

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Than what he chooses.

speaker: CAESAR
text: You are too indulgent. Let’s grant it is not

speaker: CAESAR
text: Amiss to tumble on the bed of Ptolemy,

speaker: CAESAR
text: To give a kingdom for a mirth, to sit

speaker: CAESAR
text: And keep the turn of tippling with a slave,

speaker: CAESAR
text: To reel the streets at noon and stand the buffet

speaker: CAESAR
text: With knaves that smells of sweat. Say this becomes him—

speaker: CAESAR
text: As his composure must be rare indeed

speaker: CAESAR
text: Whom these things cannot blemish—yet must Antony

speaker: CAESAR
text: No way excuse his foils when we do bear

speaker: CAESAR
text: So great weight in his lightness. If he filled

speaker: CAESAR
text: His vacancy with his voluptuousness,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Full surfeits and the dryness of his bones

speaker: CAESAR
text: Call on him for ’t. But to confound such time

speaker: CAESAR
text: That drums him from his sport and speaks as loud

speaker: CAESAR
text: As his own state and ours, ’tis to be chid

speaker: CAESAR
text: As we rate boys who, being mature in knowledge,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Pawn their experience to their present pleasure

speaker: CAESAR
text: And so rebel to judgment.

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Here’s more news.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Thy biddings have been done, and every hour,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Most noble Caesar, shalt thou have report

speaker: MESSENGER
text: How ’tis abroad. Pompey is strong at sea,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: And it appears he is beloved of those

speaker: MESSENGER
text: That only have feared Caesar. To the ports

speaker: MESSENGER
text: The discontents repair, and men’s reports

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Give him much wronged.

speaker: CAESAR
text: I should have known no less.

speaker: CAESAR
text: It hath been taught us from the primal state

speaker: CAESAR
text: That he which is was wished until he were,

speaker: CAESAR
text: And the ebbed man, ne’er loved till ne’er worth love,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Comes feared by being lacked. This common body,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Like to a vagabond flag upon the stream,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Goes to and back, lackeying the varying tide

speaker: CAESAR
text: To rot itself with motion.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: Caesar, I bring thee word

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: Menecrates and Menas, famous pirates,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: Makes the sea serve them, which they ear and wound

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: With keels of every kind. Many hot inroads

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: They make in Italy—the borders maritime

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: Lack blood to think on ’t—and flush youth revolt.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: No vessel can peep forth but ’tis as soon

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: Taken as seen, for Pompey’s name strikes more

speaker:
SECOND
               
              MESSENGER
text: Than could his war resisted.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Antony,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Leave thy lascivious wassails. When thou once

speaker: CAESAR
text: Was beaten from Modena, where thou slew’st

speaker: CAESAR
text: Hirsius and Pansa, consuls, at thy heel

speaker: CAESAR
text: Did famine follow, whom thou fought’st against,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Though daintily brought up, with patience more

speaker: CAESAR
text: Than savages could suffer. Thou didst drink

speaker: CAESAR
text: The stale of horses and the gilded puddle

speaker: CAESAR
text: Which beasts would cough at. Thy palate then did deign

speaker: CAESAR
text: The roughest berry on the rudest hedge.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Yea, like the stag when snow the pasture sheets,

speaker: CAESAR
text: The barks of trees thou browsèd. On the Alps

speaker: CAESAR
text: It is reported thou didst eat strange flesh

speaker: CAESAR
text: Which some did die to look on. And all this—

speaker: CAESAR
text: It wounds thine honor that I speak it now—

speaker: CAESAR
text: Was borne so like a soldier that thy cheek

speaker: CAESAR
text: So much as lanked not.

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: ’Tis pity of him.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Let his shames quickly

speaker: CAESAR
text: Drive him to Rome. ’Tis time we twain

speaker: CAESAR
text: Did show ourselves i’ th’ field, and to that end

speaker: CAESAR
text: Assemble we immediate council. Pompey

speaker: CAESAR
text: Thrives in our idleness.

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Tomorrow, Caesar,

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: I shall be furnished to inform you rightly

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Both what by sea and land I can be able

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: To front this present time.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Till which encounter,

speaker: CAESAR
text: It is my business too. Farewell.

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Farewell, my lord. What you shall know meantime

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Of stirs abroad, I shall beseech you, sir,

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: To let me be partaker.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Doubt not, sir. I knew it for my bond.
